name: Birth of the Moon
$comment: A scene places bodies and sets their initial conditions; it never defines them. The target and impactor NAME defined bodies (assets/bodies/*.json) and take their radii, core boundaries, densities and materials from there. This file previously declared a 2,700 km impactor against Theia's real 3,390 km, and a 5,000 km 'Earth' massing 0.48 Earth - a compute reduction wearing a planet's name, which made every mass, speed and timescale in the scene quietly wrong. Resolution is now the only compute knob (particle count).
